hints.category: The health area of the record (digestive, skin, mobility…). It helps you filter and find similar past records for context.
hints.attachments: Attach photos or PDFs (test results, symptom photos). Large images are automatically downscaled to save storage.
hints.similarSummary: AI summary of similar past records — helps you see what worked before and makes vet communication easier.
hints.severity: Record severity: mild (minor), moderate (needs attention), severe (vet visit required).

page.title: Health Diary
page.description: Record your dog's health records, what worked and what didn't — next time you'll see proven solutions.
page.noPetsDescription: The health diary requires at least one pet profile.
page.storageWarning: Attachment storage is approaching the limit ({{used}} MB / {{limit}} MB). Consider deleting older records or saving without attachments.

empty.noEpisodesDescription: Record your dog's health conditions, what worked and what didn't — next time you'll see proven solutions.
empty.noFilterResultsTitle: No records match the current filter
empty.noFilterResultsDescription: Try removing a category filter or clearing the search.

form.locationPlaceholder: e.g. hiking trip in the mountains
form.lessonsPlaceholder: e.g. for reflux give Y immediately, avoid Z

similar.title: Similar records
similar.loading: Searching for similar records and summarising...
similar.noSimilar: No similar records found in history yet. For serious conditions please consult a veterinarian.
similar.aiError: Failed to load AI summary: {{error}}. Showing local similar records by category.
similar.noLocalSimilar: No records in the same category in history.

attachments.title: Photo attachments
attachments.errorImageOnly: Only images are supported (JPG, PNG, WEBP).
attachments.errorTooLarge: Image is too large and could not be resized. Try a lower resolution.
